projectDescription: An AI-first self-hosted knowledge base and startup OS where everything lives as markdown files on disk, with AI agents that have memory, scheduled jobs, and a built-in WYSIWYG editor.
keyFeatures: File-based knowledge base — all content is Markdown on disk, no database
AI agents with roles, scheduled heartbeat jobs, and persistent memory
20 pre-built agent templates (CEO, CFO, Marketing, Engineering, etc.)
WYSIWYG + Markdown editor powered by Tiptap with slash commands
Git-backed version history — every save auto-commits with full diff viewer
Embedded HTML apps — drop an index.html in any folder to render it as an iframe
Web terminal — full xterm.js + node-pty terminal in the browser
Full-text Cmd+K search across all pages with fuzzy matching
Multi-provider AI support — Claude Code, Codex CLI, and more
Electron desktop app and self-hosted Next.js deployment options
publicApiSurface: GET/POST /api/agents/[slug]/jobs — list and create agent jobs
GET /api/git — git log, diff, and commit history
GET /api/search — full-text search across knowledge base
POST /api/ai/edit — AI-powered page editing via Claude
